历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 1232 → 1556 → 934 → 8573 → 2829. In 2024, due to Shaanxi's first new college entrance examination reform, there was a significant fluctuation in ranking (8573), which returned to 2829 in 2025. The recent two-year baseline ranking is about 2829. The university's enrollment plan in Shaanxi for Physics Category: 89 in 2021, 80 in 2022, 79 in 2023, 85 in 2024, 80 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 112, a substantial 40% increase compared to 2025, significantly impacting the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Ranking, it ranks 9th (8th from 2021 to 2024), firmly in the top 10 national elite universities. Its reputation in 2026 is generally positive, with the cafeteria ranked first nationally and excellent dormitory conditions. Its overall Douyin popularity ranks 22nd (relatively hot), and it was ranked 2nd in 2021 (very hot). No significant admission gaps have been observed, and overall application attention is high. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has 17 disciplines rated A- or above: Mechanical Engineering A+, Optical Engineering A+, Electrical Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Control Science and Engineering A, Materials Science and Engineering A, Physics A, Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics A, Management Science and Engineering A, etc., highly matching the Physics Category enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are all highly recommended popular majors. In 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Shaanxi is approximately 206,500, an increase of about 19.7% from 172,468 in 2025, intensifying competition. Huazhong University of Science and Technology is located in Wuhan, Hubei, in the central region. Its enrollment proportion in Shaanxi is about 1.4%–3.1%. Although not a local university, as a top national 985, it has stable appeal to Shaanxi examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2829, the significant 40% enrollment expansion in 2026 (which will push the ranking backward), the approximately 19.7% increase in local Physics Category examinees (intensifying competition), the positive reputation, and outstanding advantageous disciplines (attracting high-scoring students), the expansion effect outweighs the examinee increase, but the reputation and popularity have an upward offset. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 3458, with a range of 3064–3852.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Computer Science and Technology (Turing Qiming Experimental Class)
- Artificial Intelligence (Embodied Interactive Intelligence Qiming Experimental Class)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation (Electrical AI Qiming Experimental Class)
- Electronic Information (Future Technology Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Computer Science (School of Computer Science)
- Artificial Intelligence
- Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering
- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Clinical Medicine (Eight-Year Program)
- Electronic Information (School of Electronic Information).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Mechanical Engineering (Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation, etc.)
- Physics
- Materials Science and Engineering
- Civil Engineering
- Environmental Science and Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 3064–3852, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. Tier 1 Qiming Experimental Classes are highly competitive, requiring rankings significantly better than the lower bound of the range. Tier 2 majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, and Optoelectronics align well with the university's advantageous disciplines and offer good employment prospects. Tier 3 traditional engineering and basic science majors can serve as stable options.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category (including Liberal Arts) was approximately 516 → 669 → 537 → 565 → 689, fluctuating within the 500–700 range, with a baseline of about 689 in 2025, showing a slight backward trend over the past five years. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Shaanxi: 8 in 2021, 12 in 2022, 14 in 2023, 13 in 2024, 20 in 2025; 21 in 2026, an increase of 5% compared to 2025, a small expansion.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; ranked 9th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, firmly in the national Top 10; reputation evaluation in 2026 is relatively positive, with the cafeteria ranked first nationally; Douyin popularity is hot; no record of admission gaps, stable application attention; Journalism and Communication A-, Business Administration A-, etc., partially matching the History Category enrollment majors (Journalism and Communication, Business Administration, Chinese Language and Literature, etc.).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is recommended, Chinese Language/Literature is recommended, Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged; in 2026, the number of History Category examinees in the province is about 88,500, an increase of about 17% from 75,641 in 2025, intensifying competition; Huazhong University of Science and Technology is located in Wuhan, Hubei, not a local university; the number of admissions for Liberal Arts/History Category in Shaanxi has increased from 8 to 21, with a gradually increasing proportion, showing increased attention to Shaanxi liberal arts students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 689, a small 5% expansion in 2026 (limited impact), an increase of about 17% in local History Category examinees (intensified competition), and a relatively positive university reputation, the increase in examinees is greater than the expansion, leading to slightly intensified competition. The predicted minimum ranking is about 690, with a range of 611–769.
